text: ATP get this kid a meta quest 3s🥀🥀🥀
249 might as well buy him a Xbox series s or a old gen console
text_zh: 249块，还不如直接买个Xbox series s或者老款主机

text: One in store is literally cheaper
How she felt after the video
I'll leave you the link right here 😑 brother they can't see that
text_zh: 我把链接留在这儿 😑 兄弟，他们看不到那个

text: Can we clap for the acting 👏👏👏👏
text_zh: 能不能给这演技鼓鼓掌 👏👏👏👏
直接买个Wii不就得了兄弟 🥀

text: Bro, just talking to random people at this point😭
text_zh: 哥们，现在只能跟陌生人聊天了😭

text: Let them get their shi bruh
Match price on temu I can get that for half so match price
text_zh: 在Temu上匹配价格，我能用半价拿到，所以匹配价格

text: im buying a wii instead is that good
text_zh: 我准备买个Wii代替，那样好吗

text: Why not just buy a Wii…
text_zh: 为什么不直接买个 Wii 呢...

text: I have it and you have to pay a subscription to play all the games. It’s like $100.
text_zh: 我有一个，但是要付费订阅才能玩所有游戏。大概100美元。

text: Omg it’s so low like it’s not a differents
text_zh: 我的天，它太低了，感觉没什么不一样

text: it's literally no difference in the prices are almost the same there is a 40 dollar difference
text_zh: 价格真的没啥区别，差不多一样，就差了40块钱

text: My kids sweat so much after 30 min of this 🥰it helped my 3 yr old stay off the iPad😅
text_zh: 我孩子玩30分钟后会出好多汗 🥰，帮我3岁的孩子不玩iPad了😅

text: The new ps5 😭 ts will make you pay 465$ for 2 year subscription and console the ps5 is better and a switch will do better bro
text_zh: 这新出的PS5😭，要你花465美元买两年订阅和主机，PS5更好，Switch也比它强多了老兄

text: My kids have been playing this all day. I feel like I could finally breathe😅 they actually sweat when they’re using this game🤣
text_zh: 我孩子玩了一整天了。感觉我终于可以喘口气了😅 他们玩这个游戏的时候真的会出汗🤣

text: [Sticker] How do they see the link
text_zh: [贴纸] 他们怎么看到链接

text: My aunt and uncle got my baby cousin it and he loves it
text_zh: 我姑姑和姑父给我小表弟买了，他超喜欢。

text: the big four runs better games than ts 💔
text_zh: 四大厂商的游戏比这个好 💔

text: Bro, not gonna lie it’s like $15 less and there’s no way we can’t afford $15 less😭😭😭
text_zh: 哥们，说实话，便宜了15美元，我们不可能买不起这15美元😭😭😭

text: not worth it at all just get a p5 or a wii
text_zh: 一点都不值，直接买个 p5 或者 wii 就行了

text: Uh we need 20 bucks for it to be 269 so it’s like almost the same price
text_zh: 呃，我们需要20块钱才能到269，所以差不多是同一个价钱

text: My meta quest is the same price but its way funner and better
text_zh: 我的 Meta Quest 价格一样，但好玩多了，也好用多了

text: I’m not getting that never NEVER I still going to use my ps5
text_zh: 我不会买的，永远不！我还是会继续用我的 PS5

text: My dad got me this it was so good but then it got so boring the only game I liked was the basketball one
text_zh: 我爸给我买的，刚开始挺好玩，后来就无聊了，唯一喜欢的游戏是篮球那个。

text: Why is it always Black Friday
text_zh: 为什么老是黑色星期五

text: Buying a baby a ps5 THAT THINGS BIGGER THAN HIM
text_zh: 给宝宝买 PS5，那玩意儿比他还大

text: 250 same price for a small box
text_zh: 250 同样的价格买个小盒子

text: not the new ps5 but good to not make your kids brainrotted by fortnite and other games
text_zh: 不是新的PS5，但至少比让孩子被堡垒之夜和其他游戏脑残化好

text: He doesn’t even look like he’s 3 yet
text_zh: 他看起来根本不像才3岁

text: I got one and it’s only fun if you buy the pass and that’s still only fun for 30 minutes
text_zh: 我买了一个，只有买了通行证才好玩，而且也只能玩半小时

text: a wii with the sports kit is cheaper than this 🤣 what a joke
text_zh: 带运动套件的 Wii 比这个便宜多了 🤣 真搞笑

text: Same price rn and taxes is prolly more btw
text_zh: 现在价格一样，而且税可能还更高，话说回来

text: Kids gonna grow out of it so they’re going to want a ps or xbox so fuh the lil box wii better anyway
text_zh: 孩子很快就会长大，到时候他们就会想要PS或者Xbox，所以那个小盒子Wii还是更好的 anyway
